name: Paracetamol 500mg
description: Effective relief from fever, headache, body aches, and mild-to-moderate pain. Gentle on the stomach.

name: Ibuprofen 400mg
description: Non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) designed to reduce hormones that cause pain and inflammation.

name: Amoxicillin 500mg
description: Penicillin-class antibiotic used to treat bacterial infections of the chest, tonsils, sinuses, and urinary tract.

name: Azithromycin 500mg
description: Broad-spectrum macrolide antibiotic primarily used for respiratory tract infections, skin infections, and ear infections.

name: Atorvastatin 10mg
description: HMG-CoA reductase inhibitor (statin) used to lower bad cholesterol (LDL) and triglycerides, lowering heart attack risks.

name: Amlodipine 5mg
description: Calcium channel blocker used to treat high blood pressure (hypertension) and chest pain (angina).

name: Vitamin C 500mg (Chewable)
description: Daily antioxidant support to boost immune health, improve iron absorption, and maintain healthy skin and cartilage.

name: Omega-3 Fish Oil 1000mg
description: Premium dietary supplement containing EPA and DHA essential fatty acids to support cardiovascular, joint, and cognitive health.

name: Antiseptic Liquid (Dettol style)
description: Concentrated antiseptic solution for first aid, wound cleansing, personal hygiene, and household surface sanitization.

name: Cough Relief Syrup
description: Soothing syrup that relieves dry, tickly coughs and reduces throat irritation. Non-drowsy formula.

name: Baby Moisturizing Lotion
description: Hypoallergenic, pH-balanced moisturizer enriched with natural chamomile to protect baby's delicate skin barrier.

name: Metoprolol Succinate 50mg
description: Beta-blocker used to treat high blood pressure, heart failure, and chest pain. Extended-release formulation.
